key.name: notify-agent-stop
key.description: Desktop notification when a subagent completes.

key.name: notify-agent-start
key.description: Desktop notification when a subagent spawns.

key.name: notify-compact
key.description: Desktop notification when Claude Code compacts its context window.

key.name: notify-tool-error
key.description: Desktop notification when a tool call fails.

key.name: notify-task-done
key.description: Desktop notification when a task is completed.

key.name: notify-claude
key.description: Forward Claude Code's own notifications (e.g. "waiting for input") as desktop notifications.

key.name: stale-agent-timeout
key.description: Remove agents running longer than this. 0 = disabled.

key.name: max-events-file-size
key.description: Truncate the events file when idle and exceeding this size. 0 = disabled.

key.name: session-history-size
key.description: Number of recently completed sessions to keep.

key.name: theme
key.description: Visual theme for the activity graph and menu. One of: default, compact, cyberpunk, tron.

key.name: auto-dnd
key.description: Enable GNOME Do Not Disturb when agents are active, restore when all finish.

key.name: sound-on-finish
key.description: Play a system sound when an agent completes its work.

key.name: toggle-menu
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle the Claude Pulse dropdown menu.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Position in the top panel: left, center, right.
